caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with white embroidery, and over-ear headphones. He sits behind a professional microphone and has a watch on his left wrist. In the background, a white banner features the words "EMBRACE HUSTLE" and several stars. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a logo on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". The man is captured in a medium shot, looking slightly off-camera to his right. As the scene progresses, he maintains a similar posture with his hands resting on the table, while his facial expression shifts slightly and his mouth opens as if he is speaking. The overall setting remains static, with no changes to the lighting or the positioning of the equipment.
